assertions.title: Automation tiers enforce the configured approval path

steps.observed: Autopilot tab displayed with automation tier combobox

steps.expected: Supervised, Semi-Auto, Full Auto options visible
steps.observed: Combobox shows three options: Supervised, Semi-Auto, Full Auto
FAILED: Dropdown option elements are not visible/interactable - element is not visible
FAILED: API route /api/autopilot/... not found - autopilot functionality is plugin-based and not exposed via REST API

evidence.consoleErrors: WebSocket closed without opened (may be related to dev server websockets)

assertions.issues: Cannot interact with automation tier combobox - dropdown options are not visible. Delivery run API endpoints not exposed via REST API (plugin-based system). Browser automation blocked by non-interactive dropdown elements.

frictions.description: The automation tier combobox (@e47) shows three options when expanded but they are not visible/interactable via browser automation - element is not visible error
frictions.resolution: Tried multiple approaches: select command, click on option, find text 'Semi-Auto' click. All failed with 'element is not visible'. The combobox may require specific browser interaction pattern not supported by agent-browser.

frictions.description: Delivery run API endpoints are not exposed via Paperclip REST API - they exist only within the plugin system via plugin SDK test harness
frictions.resolution: The autopilot functionality is implemented as a plugin (plugin-autoresearch-improver) with its own internal data model and actions. REST API does not expose autopilot entities like delivery-runs, planning-artifacts, ideas, etc. The validation contract expects network(GET delivery run -> 200) but the API endpoint does not exist.

blockers.description: Automation tier combobox in Autopilot tab is non-interactive in browser automation - dropdown options render but cannot be clicked/selected via agent-browser
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried select, click, find text commands - all failed with 'element is not visible'. The option elements exist in DOM but are not actionable.

blockers.description: Delivery run REST API endpoints do not exist - autopilot plugin entities are only accessible via plugin SDK harness, not via HTTP API
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried GET /api/autopilot/companies/.../projects/.../delivery-runs - returns 404. The evidence requirement 'network(GET delivery run -> 200)' cannot be met because the endpoint does not exist in the REST API.

summary: VAL-AUTOPILOT-031 is blocked. The Autopilot tab with automation tier settings is visible in the UI, but: (1) The combobox dropdown is non-interactive - options render but cannot be selected via browser automation. (2) Delivery run API endpoints are not exposed via REST API - the plugin system uses its own internal data layer. The validation contract expects browser interaction with tier settings and API calls to delivery-runs endpoint, neither of which work as expected. Unit tests in plugin-autoresearch-improver verify automation tier behavior via SDK harness, but this is not accessible via the browser UI or REST API.
